description: This warm beanie hat, with added 3M Thinsulate thermal lining, will keep your head warm in colder weather - ideal for all outdoor activities such as ski-ing, gardening, outdoor work. Traditional style knitted beanie hat with turn up - this classic design is a perennial favourite. 3M Thinsulate fabric lining provides added insulation to keep you toasty warm. Made from durable fabrics, this great hat is sure to last - made from 100% Acrylic Shell and Thinsulate lining (65% Polypropolene, 35% Polyester). Hand wash. One size to fit all adult head sizes - buy as a gift with confidence that it will fit.
